entries.name: url
entries.description: URL where the invitee can review and accept the invitation.

tags.name: remarks
tags.text:
Pass `{baseUrl}/settings/organizations` — this is where pending
organization invitations are listed in the settings UI.

entries.name: email
entries.description: Email address of the user being invited

entries.name: inviterName
entries.description: Name of the person who sent the invitation

entries.name: inviterEmail
entries.description: Email address of the person who sent the invitation

entries.name: organizationName
entries.description: Name of the organization the user is being invited to

entries.name: organizationLogoURL
entries.description: Organization logo URL(s) - a single string or light/dark variants.

entries.name: role
entries.description: Role being offered to the invitee (e.g. "member", "admin", "owner")

entries.name: appName
entries.description: Name of the application sending the email

entries.name: expirationHours
entries.description: Number of hours until the invitation expires

entries.name: logoURL
entries.description: Logo URL(s) - a single string or light/dark variants. If omitted, no logo is shown.

entries.name: classNames
entries.description: Custom CSS class names for styling specific parts of the email

entries.name: colors
entries.description: Custom color scheme for light and dark modes

entries.name: poweredBy
entries.description: Whether to show the "Powered by better-auth" footer

entries.name: darkMode
entries.description: Whether to enable dark mode support

entries.name: head
entries.description: Additional React nodes to inject into the email head

entries.name: localization
entries.description: Localization overrides for customizing email text
entries.type: Partial<{ YOU_RE_INVITED_TO_ORGANIZATION: string; YOU_RE_INVITED: string; LOGO: string; ORGANIZATION_LOGO: string; INVITED_TO_JOIN_ORGANIZATION: string; ACCEPT_INVITATION: string; VIEW_INVITATION: string; OR_COPY_AND_PASTE_URL: string; THIS_INVITATION_EXPIRES_IN_HOURS: string; EMAIL_SENT_BY: string; IF_YOU_DIDNT_EXPECT_THIS_INVITATION: string; POWERED_BY_BETTER_AUTH: string; }>
